particulars.description: (1) by way of first legal mortgage:. A) those parts of the freehold land registered with title absolute at the land registry under title numbers HP742326 and HP773854 as shown shaded red on plan 1 (scheduled to the mortgage); and. B) the leasehold land demised under the lease to be entered into on the date of this mortgage between gracewell properties (hamilton) S.A.R.l and the mortgagor in respect of 8 car parking spaces on the north east side of fernhill lane, blackwater, camberley as shown edged red on plan 2.. (2) by way of first fixed charge:. A) the properties listed in (1) above, to the extent they are not effectively mortgaged or charged under clause 4.1.1 of the legal mortgage; and. B) all present and future goodwill of any business carried on at the properties listed in (1) above by or on behalf of the mortgagor.

1) all freehold and leasehold properties (whether registered or unregistered) and all commonhold properties, now or in the future (and from time to time) owned by the company, or in which the company holds an interest (including, but not limited to, the properties which are briefly described in schedule 1 (registered property) to the debenture) and all buildings and fixtures (including trade fixtures), fixed plant and machinery from time to time on any such property.. 2) all present and future goodwill and uncalled capital for the time being of the company.. 3) the intellectual property which means the company's present and future patents, trademarks, service marks, trade names, designs, copyrights, inventions, topographical or similar rights, confidential information and know-how and any interest in any of these rights, whether or not registered, including all applications and rights to apply for registration and all fees, royalties and other rights derived from, or incidental to, these rights.
